NAVAREA XIX 105/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 30 0630 UTC AUG 14.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

 65-22.1N 007-21.2E DEEPSEA BERGEN
 71-15.6N 022-15.7E SCARABEO8
 72-03.3N 020-32.5E ISLAND INNOVATOR
 71-30.6N 025-12.6E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN

NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 103/14
